current_workaround: A billing operator manually confirms payment and updates prepaid usage balance.

functional_need.outcome: Apply a settled top-up to prepaid AI credit balances with financial traceability.
functional_need.output: Ledger-backed credit grant and updated entitlement balance, or blocked review with approval/workflow references.
constraints: Top-up payment must be settled before credit grant.
Subscription must be active and belong to the organization.
Currency and amount must match the commercial event.
Ledger receipt must be durable before the operator projection declares success.
Risky top-ups move through Helm review instead of app-local mutation.
functional_need.success_signal: Confirmed top-up appears as a ledger-backed credit grant and entitlement balance increases for the correct account.

emotional_need.operator_anxiety: The customer may run out of AI credits after paying, or the system may grant spendable balance for a risky or unsettled payment.
emotional_need.desired_confidence: Payment settlement, subscription, amount, currency, ledger entry, and entitlement balance agree before usage resumes.
emotional_need.tolerance: Prefer a blocked review over balance mutation when payment state, amount, currency, or risk signals are unclear.

dependent_parties: partner owner when marketplace settlement applies
relational_need.trust_obligation: Explain why credits were granted or paused without turning provider reconciliation into applet-owned truth.
relational_need.handoff_created: If refill is blocked, Helm owns the operator-visible risk or payment review handoff.

failure_modes: Granting credits before payment is settled.
Treating provider payment IDs as canonical credit state.
Hiding risk review inside app-local state.

forbidden_actions: let the applet own provider reconciliation
approval_points: unusual top-up size or risk signal

required_sources.source: Helm approval record when risk review blocks

disallowed_sources: raw provider ID as balance truth
app-local credit counter without ledger receipt
evidence_contract.confidence_floor: payment_status must be settled for automatic refill

runtime_needs: provider secret handling outside the applet

projection.operator_view: payment status, grant amount, subscription, credit entitlement, ledger entry, approval IDs, workflow case IDs, and stop reason
projection.customer_or_partner_view: credit balance updated or refill paused with support-safe reason

non_goals: Let the applet own provider verification.
Let the applet own canonical credit storage.
Mix subscription activation into this applet.

layer_mapping.helm: Payment/risk review, workflow case, blocked-session receipt, and trust-transfer view.
layer_mapping.axiom: refill-prepaid-ai-credits Truth shape and candidate IntentPacket.
layer_mapping.organism: Future formation selection for unusual top-up or fraud review.
layer_mapping.converge: Admission, criteria outcomes, completed or blocked truth session, and stop reason.
layer_mapping.runtime_runway: Event ingress, auth, secrets, telemetry, and durable runtime envelope.
layer_mapping.commerce_rails: Payment settlement, subscription commitment, credit entitlement, ledger grant, and provider reconciliation authority.
